key.name: verbose
key.description: Verbosity level (0 is disabled, default is info, 7 is trace)

key.name: storage
key.description: Path to store downloaded torrents in

key.name: gatewayremote
key.description: Use a remote hTorrent gateway instead of the local one

key.name: gatewayurl
key.description: URL of the remote hTorrent gateway to use

key.name: gatewayusername
key.description: Username for the remote hTorrent gateway

key.name: gatewaypassword
key.description: Password for the remote hTorrent gateway

key.name: p2pandarelay
key.description: URL of the iroh relay server used for NAT traversal

key.name: p2pandanetwork
key.description: 32-byte hex-encoded network identifier separating multiplex traffic from other p2panda apps

key.name: p2pandabootstrap
key.description: Hex-encoded public key of a bootstrap node to use for peer discovery across networks. Empty means rely on the relay and mDNS only.
